artPrompt: The charged instant a deal seizes control: a portly goblin Don in a dim back room reaches a beringed hand into a slash of amber lamplight, fingers foreshortened toward the viewer, while a larger looming figure bows its head into his shadow as if puppeted. Cigar smoke curls in the warm light, ink-black shadow swallows the worn card table behind, intimate criminal menace. Rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Buy the Incumbent
text:
Gain control of target creature with the highest power among creatures other players control until end of turn. It gains haste. Whoever's on top, the Don is on top of them.
That player creates a Treasure (severance) and you create a Favor token. Term limits are for honest towns.
flavorText: Every incumbent in Whateverville has the same campaign slogan: "Whatever the Don says."
